name: Chicken Scalopine
recipeIngredient: 1 each Salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large non-stick frying pan.
2. Saute mushrooms until tender and any liquid has evaporated; remove from the pan and set aside.
3. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons butter in the same pan.
4. Saute chicken breasts on both sides until golden brown and cooked through; remove from the pan and set aside.
5. Add onions to the pan and saute until tender.
6. Add water, white wine, and chicken bouillon mix to the pan. Bring to a boil.
7. Cook and stir until the mixture is reduced by half.
8. Add whipping cream to the pan. Cook and stir until slightly thickened.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Return mushrooms and chicken to the sauce in the pan.
11. Reheat to serving temperature.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
